creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
This morning, I updated to:

FreeBSD g1-253.catwhisker.org 10.1-STABLE FreeBSD 10.1-STABLE #1413  r275757M/275757:1001504: Sun Dec 14 05:13:47 PST 2014     root@g1-253.catwhisker.org:/common/S1/obj/usr/src/sys/CANARY  i386

and x11/nvidia-driver is now at 340.65; I am not seeing the REDZONE whine, and I do not notice any change in behavior.
